finding_results.notes: Five targeted revisions across the cited spans. Maren self-corrects at line 127 (false start on the bounty insight: 'It's not — ' before restarting), trails off at line 275 (grievance list breaks on Derry's name: 'and — ' with 'He couldn't get past Derry'), and redirects at line 383 (clean negative list collapses into concrete observation: 'Not for whatever — ' then pivots to the ash test). Aldric's formal framework cracks twice: at line 147 his contamination explanation breaks mid-sentence ('Gave the opening a —') before he restarts with an admission that his framework is insufficient, and at lines 225-229 his report-cadence collapses on the word 'buried' ('I can say I was —'), forcing a restart as raw admission ('I was buried alive'). All revisions preserve Aldric's low-contraction formality and Maren's high-contraction colloquial register. No must-land beats, tracked payoffs, or continuity facts were altered.

summary: Roughened dialogue at all five cited composed-reveal spans. Maren now visibly self-corrects, trails off, or redirects in three passages instead of landing clean thesis statements. Aldric's two longest doctrinal explanations now break mid-sentence under strain, with restarts that show the formal framework failing rather than delivering serene analysis. Changes are dialogue-local; no structural, continuity, or payoff alterations.
